M1880_CU_PREP_MEAL M1880 (M0720) Current Preparing Light Meals This field indicates the patient's current ability to plan and prepare light meals safely. 00 = (a) Able to independently plan and prepare all light meals for self or reheat delivered meals; OR (b) Is physically, cognitively, and mentally able to prepare
